message:
fix: include children of blocked parents in bd blocked (GH#1495)

Children whose parent is blocked were excluded from ready work but not
shown in blocked output, making them invisible. Now GetBlockedIssues
includes transitive children with their blocked parent as the reason.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
